title: Chunk Loader Mod
description: Adds a ChunkLoader Block and a little more!
body:
this mod adds:
- Bulb
- Crying Obsidian
- Chunk Loader

The Chunk Loader will allow you to have a 3x3 radius of chunks loaded, I made this so that my redstone line would work

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/geWebf9NLWw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Known Issues:
-chunkloaders may not work when the world is still being loaded
